violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The hand sink at the bar is lacking proper signage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the floor mixer, plastic carts, side of hand sink in server area, and prep unit have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. The chest freezer has an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The hand sink near the food prep sink is in poor repair, with the splash guard separating from the sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the pizza prep unit, and lowboy in back service have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
The establishment does not have air gaps in the dishroom for the dishwasher, and beneath the food prep sink. Both areas currently have air breaks. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink at the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bar was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
A strainer was observed in the hand-washing sink at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-300 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and large dough hook) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by numerous live small flies, especially in the dishroom. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Waltham PCS last date of service 4/4/2024. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was o parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonia sanitizer is 150-300 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

Linens and single service items observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. Linens and single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The salad prep unit, and the large dough hook were not in good repair, both taped up, impacting their ability to be cleaned & sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar and kitchen dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust and debris.The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and debris:empty prep unit in pizza areamixing bowls in dining roomseveral plastic carts3 bay sinksalad prep unitcan openerdipper wellbar cooler for storing glasses. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
The establishment does not have air gaps in the dishroom for the dishwasher, and beneath the food prep sink. Both areas currently have air breaks. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024

The floors have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially in the dishroom and along the outside wall of dishroom. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024
